2605.10114.title: SkillRAE: Agent Skill-Based Context Compilation for Retrieval-Augmented Execution
2605.10114.paper_summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents (e.g., OpenClaw) increasingly rely on reusable skill libraries to solve artifact-rich tasks such as document-centric workflows and data-intensive analysis. As these libraries grow, a few works have attempted to study the Retrieval-Augmented Execution (RAE), which often first retrieves some external skills and other knowledge, then compiles the context using retrieved skills, and finally executes the task. Existing works mainly focus on optimizing skill retrieval and task execution, and they pay little attention to how to effectively organize the selected skill evidence in a form that is compact, grounded, and immediately usable for the downstream executors to complete tasks. To fill this gap, we propose SkillRAE, a two-stage RAE approach focusing on skill-based context compilation, which consists of the offline and online stages. Specifically, in the offline indexing stage, it builds a multi-level skill graph over skill communities, skills, and reusable subunits, for capturing their relationships. In the online retrieval stage, it first performs skill-ranked retrieval with selected-subunit evidence export in the graph, and then applies rescue-aware compact compilation to recover the key evidence. Together, these components compile a coarse-ranked skill set into a task-specific context that is compact, grounded, and immediately usable. Experiments on two public benchmarks show that SkillRAE achieves a significant improvement over baselines for RAE. For example, on SkillsBench, it achieves an improvement of 11.7% over the SOTA method. Ablation studies further show that our context compilation is crucial, instead of a mere prompt addition.
2605.10114.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）基礎的代理（例如，OpenClaw）越來越依賴可重用的技能庫來解決如文件中心工作流程和數據密集型分析等富含工件的任務。隨著這些庫的增長，少數研究嘗試研究檢索增強執行（RAE），該過程通常首先檢索一些外部技能和其他知識，然後使用檢索到的技能編輯上下文，最後執行任務。現有的研究主要集中在優化技能檢索和任務執行上，對於如何有效組織所選技能證據，使其以緊湊、基於事實且可立即供下游執行者完成任務的形式呈現，則關注較少。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了SkillRAE，一種專注於基於技能的上下文編輯的兩階段RAE方法，該方法包括離線和在線階段。具體而言，在離線索引階段，它在技能社群、技能和可重用子單元上構建多層次技能圖，以捕捉它們之間的關係。在在線檢索階段，它首先在圖中執行基於技能的檢索，並導出所選子單元的證據，然後應用救援意識的緊湊編輯來恢復關鍵證據。這些組件共同將粗排的技能集編輯為一個特定任務的上下文，該上下文緊湊、基於事實且可立即使用。在兩個公共基準上的實驗顯示，SkillRAE在RAE上相較於基線取得了顯著的改進。例如，在SkillsBench上，它比SOTA方法提高了11.7%。消融研究進一步顯示，我們的上下文編輯至關重要，而不僅僅是簡單的提示添加。
2605.10114.author: Xiangcheng Meng et.al.
2605.10114.authors: Xiangcheng Meng, Shu Wang, Yixiang Fang
